attempts.reflection: You repeatedly tried to craft a stone_pickaxe without having enough cobblestone and attempted to smelt iron_ore before obtaining a furnace. Additionally, you tried to craft a furnace without sufficient cobblestone. To succeed, first craft a crafting_table, then use it to make a wooden_pickaxe and a stone_pickaxe. Next, mine more cobblestone and use it to craft a furnace. Finally, use the furnace to smelt iron_ore into iron_ingots, and then shape them into iron_nuggets.

attempts.reflection: You failed to smelt iron ingots because you did not have charcoal, which is required for smelting. Additionally, you repeatedly tried to craft a furnace without enough cobblestone, leading to a waste of actions. To fix this, ensure you have charcoal before attempting to smelt iron ore. Also, prioritize gathering cobblestone to build a furnace before crafting more items. Correct the order by first crafting charcoal, then smelting iron ore into iron ingots, and finally building a furnace.
